title: Fancy tools
description: Added some flair to your tools! (Programmer art included)
body:
# Fancy tools - Fancy tools (Programmer art)

**This make all your tools look fancy and they get more fancy the higher tier they are!**

## NOTES

**No mods needed this is fully vanilla!**

**Recommended to use this [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix/versions) to fix the stitching.**

**Make sure this goes at the top of the resourcepack list**
